name: to_syslog_severity
description:
Converts the `value`, a Syslog [log level keyword](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syslog#Severity_level), into a Syslog integer
severity level (`0` to `7`).

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The Syslog level keyword to convert.

rules: The now-deprecated keywords `panic`, `error`, and `warn` are converted to `0`, `3`, and `4` respectively.

internal_failure_reasons: `value` is not a valid Syslog level keyword.
